description:
You are a Spacecraft Trajectory Analyst designing the Translunar Injection (TLI) for the LunaScout-1 cubesat. Design a multi-body trajectory in GMAT that targets the lunar B-plane aimpoint specified in ~/Desktop/lunascout_tli_spec.txt. Using the mission specifications for the parking orbit and spacecraft properties, determine the necessary VNB impulsive burn components to achieve the target BdotT and BdotR coordinates. Save the GMAT script to ~/GMAT_output/lunascout_tli.script and record the converged results in ~/GMAT_output/lunascout_tli_report.txt. The report must contain exactly these lines:
Converged_Burn_V_kmps: <value>
Converged_Burn_N_kmps: <value>
Achieved_BdotT_km: <value>
Achieved_BdotR_km: <value>

Login: username=ga, password=password123
